datasets.name: Nemotron-Personas
datasets.description: NVIDIA synthetic personas grounded in U.S. census demographics; structured demographic fields plus several narrative persona fields.

datasets.name: Persona Hub
datasets.description: Tencent's web-derived persona collection (1B scale; ~200K preview + ~370M elite released); each persona is a one-line free-text description.

datasets.name: Synthetic-Persona-Chat
datasets.description: Google persona-grounded dialogue dataset; each row holds two speakers' personas as lists of short sentences plus a generated conversation.

datasets.name: WildChat-1M
datasets.description: AI2/Cornell corpus of real opt-in user-ChatGPT conversations with geo/metadata; persona must be derived from the conversations, not stored directly.

datasets.name: DeepPersona
datasets.description: Two-stage engine producing deep synthetic personas with hundreds of hierarchical attributes (8000+ node taxonomy) plus ~1MB narrative each.

datasets.name: PersonaChat
datasets.description: Canonical persona-grounded dialogue dataset; each persona is 4-5 short 'I ...' sentences paired with a dialogue.
